name: Pathogen Purge - Tower Defense
short_description: Pathogen Purge is a thrilling microbiological tower defense game, combining strategy and action as players become Nanobot Guardians defending the human body against relentless germs and viruses.
detailed_description: This is my first ever game so go easy on me. A exhilarating tower defense game that takes players on an epic journey through the human body as they combat and eliminate hordes of invading germs and viruses. As a player, you assume the role of a Nanobot Guardian, tasked with defending the human host from these microscopic threats. You will need to strategically position and upgrade your defensive towers to stop the relentless onslaught of pathogens while exploring different organs and systems within the body.
